rationale.org-governance: Defines lifecycle policies, roles, risk registers, reviews, and accountability.
rationale.regulatory-compliance: Operationalizes NIST, ISO, IEC, and NERC requirements with evidence.
rationale.rules-based-checks: Integrates adversarial tests, security SLO validation, monitoring, and rollback triggers.
rationale.hitl-workflow: Establishes quarterly risk reviews and approval checkpoints for material changes.
rationale.provenance-auditability: Persists signed SBOMs, lineage, logs, reports, and auditable change records.
rationale.survey-input: Expert interviews quantify implementation feasibility and perceived compliance value.
rationale.framework: Provides a reusable five-phase control and evidence architecture.
rationale.built-system: Deployed and evaluated the framework in an industrial monitoring pipeline.
rationale.expert-validated: Twelve industry experts assessed applicability, feasibility, and compliance value.
rationale.general-ai: Governs critical-infrastructure AI systems rather than AI-generated code.
rationale.risk-security: Evaluates security robustness, attack detection, threats, and lifecycle mitigations.
rationale.method-self-report: Structured interviews collected assessments from twelve industry experts.
rationale.method-field-study: Sixteen-week electric-utility deployment measured real-setting security and operational outcomes.
